name: If Condition
description: Routes execution and data to either the True or False path based on a condition.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    cond = bool(inputs.get('condition', False))
    data = inputs.get('data')
    self.log_info(f"Evaluating condition: {cond}")
    
    # Trigger execution branches
    if cond:
        self.set_output('exec_true', True)
    else:
        self.set_output('exec_false', True)
        
    # Trigger sequential output
    self.set_output('then', True)
    
    # Set data outputs
    return {
        'on_true': data if cond else None,
        'on_false': None if cond else data,
        'result': cond
    }
